content.thinking:
The user is asking me to work on an API design and documentation task. This is a coding/architecture task that I should delegate to the appropriate worker according to my delegation protocol in MEMORY.md.

Let me review my workers:
- coding-1: Python — scripts, data processing, ML pipelines
- coding-2: JavaScript/TypeScript — web, Node.js, React
- coding-3: Bash/Infrastructure — shell scripts, DevOps, system admin
- coding-4: Testing/Review — unit tests, code review, quality assurance

This task involves designing RESTful + WebSocket APIs in OpenAPI 3.0 format. This is a web/API design task that would typically involve JSON/YAML specifications. Based on the specialties:
- coding-2 (JavaScript/TypeScript - web) would be most appropriate for API design since OpenAPI specs are commonly used in web/JS ecosystems

I should delegate this task to coding-2 and potentially have coding-4 review it afterward since it's a critical specification document.

Let me send the task to coding-2

content.text: Got it. This is an API design task requiring OpenAPI 3.0 specification for a contract management system. Routing to the JavaScript/Web specialist (coding-2) since OpenAPI specs are core to web API development

arguments.message:
[Workflow Task from Beta Manager]

**Task:** API Design & Documentation
**Priority:** 1
**Subtask ID:** c4f0d545
**Workflow ID:** 9ccce7a0-d4c

**Objective:** Create complete OpenAPI 3.0 specification for Contract Management Platform

**Required APIs:**
1. Contract upload/analysis (POST /contracts, GET /contracts/{id}/analysis, etc.)
2. Real-time collaboration (WebSocket endpoints for live editing, comments, presence)
3. User management (CRUD for users, roles, permissions)
4. Billing/subscription (plans, subscriptions, payments, invoices)
5. Webhooks for integrations (register, configure, delivery logs)

**Deliverable Requirements:**
- Complete OpenAPI 3.0 YAML or JSON spec
- All endpoints with HTTP methods, paths, query params
- Full request/response schemas with examples
- Authentication schemes (JWT + API keys)
- Rate limiting definitions (429 responses, headers)
- Error response schemas (400, 401, 403, 404, 429, 500) with error codes
- WebSocket upgrade paths and message schemas

**Write to:** `/Users/landonking/openclaw-army/agents/beta-manager/workspace/api/openapi.yaml`

**Return:** Confirm completion with summary of endpoints and any design decisions made.

Be thorough - this spec needs to be implementation-ready.

content.thinking: The worker timed out. Let me check the status of coding-2 and then decide how to proceed.

content.text:
TECH IMPLEMENTATION TASK (Priority 1, Subtask 3711bf9e):

Create JavaScript/TypeScript SDK and Postman collection in ~/openclaw-core/data/tech-implementation/sdk/

1. **javascript/** TypeScript SDK:
   - async HTTP client for OpenClaw API
- Interfaces for API types
- Authentication handling
- Methods: sendMessage, spawnSession, listSessions, getStatus
- Error handling
- Retry logic
- Jest test suite
- package.json with types
- README with usage examples

2. **postman/** collection:
   - Complete API collection for all endpoints
- Environment variables for {{baseUrl}}, {{apiKey}}
- Organized folders: Sessions, Messages, Sub-agents, Memory
- Example requests with real payloads
- Tests for response validation

Return when complete.

**Task:** API Design & Documentation
**Priority:** 1
**Subtask ID:** c4f0d545
**Workflow ID:** 9ccce7a0-d4c

**Objective:** Create complete OpenAPI 3.0 specification for Contract Management Platform

**Required APIs:**
1. Contract upload/analysis (POST /contracts, GET /contracts/{id}/analysis, etc.)
2. Real-time collaboration (WebSocket endpoints for live editing, comments, presence)
3. User management (CRUD for users, roles, permissions)
4. Billing/subscription (plans, subscriptions, payments, invoices)
5. Webhooks for integrations (register, configure, delivery logs)

**Deliverable Requirements:**
- Complete OpenAPI 3.0 YAML or JSON spec
- All endpoints with HTTP methods, paths, query params
- Full request/response schemas with examples
- Authentication schemes (JWT + API keys)
- Rate limiting definitions (429 responses, headers)
- Error response schemas (400, 401, 403, 404, 429, 500) with error codes
- WebSocket upgrade paths and message schemas

**Write to:** `/Users/landonking/openclaw-army/agents/beta-manager/workspace/api/openapi.yaml`

**Return:** Confirm completion with summary of endpoints and any design decisions made.

Be thorough - this spec needs to be implementation-ready.

content.thinking:
I can see that coding-2 has received my task (it's in the history) but it looks like it was previously working on a DIFFERENT task - it was building a JavaScript SDK for OpenClaw API, not an OpenAPI spec for the Contract Management Platform. This is a context issue.

My task was sent but the session was in the middle of something else. I need to either:
1. Wait for coding-2 to finish its current work
2. Spawn a new subagent dedicated to this task
3. Handle it myself

Given this is a priority 1 task and coding-2 appears busy with other work, let me handle this task myself as the fallback. I'll create the OpenAPI 3.0

content.text:
coding-2 was mid-task on something else when my message arrived. I'll handle this API spec task directly to ensure priority completion.

Creating the OpenAPI 3.0 specification now

arguments.content:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Contract Management Platform API
  description: |
    Complete RESTful API + WebSocket endpoints for contract management,
    real-time collaboration, user management, billing, and integrations.
  version: 1.0.0
  contact:
    name: API Support
    email: api@contractplatform.com
  license:
    name: Proprietary
    url: https://contractplatform.com/terms

servers:
  - url: https://api.contractplatform.com/v1
    description: Production
  - url: https://api.staging.contractplatform.com/v1
    description: Staging

security:
  - bearerAuth: []
  - apiKeyAuth: []

tags:
  - name: Authentication
    description: Authentication and token management
  - name: Contracts
    description: Contract upload, storage, and analysis
  - name: Analysis
    description: AI-powered contract analysis and insights
  - name: Collaboration
    description: Real-time collaboration via WebSocket
  - name: Users
    description: User management and profiles
  - name: Organizations
    description: Organization and team management
  - name: Roles & Permissions
    description: Role-based access control
  - name: Billing
    description: Subscriptions, plans, and payments
  - name: Invoices
    description: Invoice management
  - name: Webhooks
    description: Webhook configuration and delivery
  - name: Integrations
    description: Third-party integrations

paths:
  # ============================================================================
  # AUTHENTICATION
  # ============================================================================
  /auth/register:
    post:
      tags: [Authentication]
      summary: Register new user
      description: Create a new user account with email/password
      security: []  # Public endpoint
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/UserRegistration'
            examples:
              minimal:
                summary: Minimal registration
                value:
                  email: user@example.com
                  password: SecurePass123!
                  firstName: John
                  lastName: Doe
              full:
                summary: Full registration
                value:
                  email: user@example.com
                  password: SecurePass123!
                  firstName: John
                  lastName: Doe
                  organizationName: Acme Corp
                  phone: +1-555-0123
                  acceptTerms: true
      responses:
        '201':
          description: User registered successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '409':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Conflict'
        '429':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/RateLimited'

  /auth/login:
    post:
      tags: [Authentication]
      summary: User login
      description: Authenticate with email/password or OAuth
      security: []  # Public endpoint
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              oneOf:
                - $ref: '#/components/schemas/PasswordLogin'
                - $ref: '#/components/schemas/OAuthLogin'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Login successful
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '429':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/RateLimited'

  /auth/refresh:
    post:
      tags: [Authentication]
      summary: Refresh access token
      description: Get new access token using refresh token
      security: []  # Uses refresh token from body
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [refreshToken]
              properties:
                refreshToken:
                  type: string
                  description: Refresh token from login
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Token refreshed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/TokenRefreshResponse'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'

  /auth/logout:
    post:
      tags: [Authentication]
      summary: User logout
      description: Invalidate current access token
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Logged out successfully
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'

  /auth/forgot-password:
    post:
      tags: [Authentication]
      summary: Request password reset
      description: Send password reset email to user
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email]
              properties:
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
      responses:
        '202':
          description: Reset email sent if user exists
        '429':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/RateLimited'

  /auth/verify-email:
    post:
      tags: [Authentication]
      summary: Verify email address
      description: Confirm email using verification token
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [token]
              properties:
                token:
                  type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Email verified
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'

  /auth/me:
    get:
      tags: [Authentication]
      summary: Get current user
      description: Retrieve authenticated user profile
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Current user profile
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'

  /auth/api-keys:
    get:
      tags: [Authentication]
      summary: List API keys
      description: Get all API keys for current user
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of API keys
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  data:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/ApiKey'
                  meta:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/PaginationMeta'
    post:
      tags: [Authentication]
      summary: Create API key
      description: Generate new API key for programmatic access
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [name]
              properties:
                name:
                  type: string
                  description: Name for the API key
                permissions:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                  description: List of permission scopes
                expiresAt:
                  type: string
                  format: date-time
      responses:
        '201':
          description: API key created (

:\n            type: integer\n            default:
